headline: Why ServiceNow (NOW) Shares Are Falling Today
summary: Shares of enterprise workflow automation company ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) fell 5% in the afternoon session after a stronger-than-expected jobs report signaled that the Federal Reserve may keep interest rates higher for longer.
